specs.title: CT2: opening a second cut while one is open returns 409 cut_already_open
CT3: GET /api/cuts/{cut_id} returns the open cut (closed_at null)
CT4: 5 sales (cash, card, transfer) get linked to the open cut
CT5: GET /api/cuts/{id}/summary exposes opening, total, expected
CT6: cash in/out movements during shift (best-effort)
CT8: closing an already-closed cut returns 409 / 400
CT9: receipt content + POST /api/printer/raw returns ok (audit_only)
